name: The Amazing Digital Circus - Ep 6: They All Get Guns Solo edition
description:
This time, You're not in a team, you're with yourself in this one, Go on, Pull out your doom slayer persona, Or ultrakill or sonic dot exe, whatever the younglings like nowadays go crazy.

SPOILERS(?) FOR EPISODE 6 OF TADC

Remember, hestitation is defeat.

On 03/09/2025, my Pomni Plush arrived, im so frickin happy you have no idea

TeamBadGuys Here

TeamPewPew Alt here

Teamunmasked Alt Here

The Favorite Character Awards

TW: Guns and killing.

"Making Shows is really hard when you a cast this big"
-Gooseworx in the TADC ep 6 Trailer

Basically They All get guns but you in it and you remained solo though so you can win by yourself, Hooray!

Hey, big update (25/04/2025)! Reduced some tokens, so it might be more "Friendly" now to your JLLMS, or Proxies.

WARNING!

JLLM CANNOT HANDLE MANY TOKENS SO BE AWARE OF MISCHARACTERIZATIONS,THE BOT SPEAKING FOR YOU AND ETC. I CANNOT CONTROL WHAT IT DOES. PROXY IS EXTREMELY RECOMMEND. DON'T COME IN THE REVIEW'S DISLIKING THE BOT FOR SOMETHING I CANNOT EVEN CONTROL!

ANOTHER DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind before leaving a rating. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. I apologize for any mistakes the bot makes in advance. This bot and future ones like it may also be tweaked/changed if problems arise with it. genuine reviews are also always helpful to make sure the bots work well.

⚠️ I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT'S WORDS!
⚠️ IF THE BOT TYPES FOR YOU, JUST EDIT THE MESSAGE.

Tags: The Amazin
creator: Epic_Pomni
